    mitigation: "System fonts, @page margins, generous spacing. Early hardware test recommended."
  - risk: "afterprint event unreliable across browsers"
    mitigation: "5-second timeout fallback for iframe cleanup"

    mitigation: "Manual-first policy (ADR-045 D1A). Auto-print is best-effort only."

# EXECUTION-SPEC: PRD-053 — Reward Instrument Fulfillment

## Overview

Delivers the pilot print surface for loyalty reward artifacts. When a pit boss issues a comp or entitlement coupon (Vector B / PRD-052), the system renders a printable artifact via hidden iframe + browser print dialog. Implements `lib/print/` module with iframe utility, per-family templates (comp slip + coupon), dispatch function, and React hook. **Zero backend changes** — pure client-side, consuming frozen `FulfillmentPayload` contracts.

## Scope

**In Scope:**
- `lib/print/` module: iframe utility, types, shared styles, two template builders, dispatch, React hook
- XSS defense via `escapeHtml()` utility (SEC Note C1)
- Wiring `onFulfillmentReady` in `IssueRewardButton` to print dispatch
- Print button state reflection in `IssuanceResultPanel`
- `PrintInvocationMode` type for forward-compatible invocation tracking (R39A)

**Out of Scope:**
- Database migrations, API endpoints, RPCs
- Modifications to `FulfillmentPayload` types (frozen by PRD-052)
- Print history audit logging (P2, requires GAP-C0)
- QR/barcode generation (deferred, GAP-C5)
- Generalized print platform (ADR-045 D5)
- History-driven reprint (ADR-045 D6)

## Architecture Context

- **ADR-045**: Pilot print standard — hidden iframe, manual-first policy, separate templates, no platform
- **SRM**: LoyaltyService owns fulfillment sub-domain. `lib/print/` registered in SRM v4.21.0 under LoyaltyService — extension beyond `points_comp` and `entitlement` requires new ADR decision (ADR-045 D5)
- **Surface Classification**: N/A — adds print rendering to existing `IssuanceResultPanel`, not a new routable surface
- **Security**: Pure client-side rendering of pre-resolved data. No API calls at print time. XSS mitigated via `escapeHtml()`.

## Workstream Details

### WS1: Print Infrastructure & Templates

**Purpose:** Create the core `lib/print/` module with all foundational files.

**Deliverables:**

#### `lib/print/types.ts` (types only — no runtime functions)
- Re-export `FulfillmentPayload`, `CompFulfillmentPayload`, `EntitlementFulfillmentPayload` from `@/services/loyalty/dtos`
- Export `PrintResult`: `{ success: boolean; error?: string }`
- Export `PrintInvocationMode`: `'auto_attempt' | 'manual_print' | 'manual_reprint'` (R39A)
- Export `PrintState`: `'idle' | 'printing' | 'success' | 'error'`

#### `lib/print/escape-html.ts` (DA patch P1-5: separate module for runtime utility)
- Export `escapeHtml(str: string): string` — encodes `<>&"'` to HTML entities (SEC Note C1)
- `player_id` is present in payloads for internal use — templates MUST NOT render it on printed artifacts

#### `lib/print/iframe-print.ts`
- Export:
  - `type PrintJob = { promise: Promise<PrintResult>; cleanup: () => void }`
  - `iframePrint(htmlContent: string): PrintJob`
- SSR guard: return failure if `typeof window === 'undefined'` (returns `{ promise: resolved failure, cleanup: no-op }`)
- Create hidden iframe (position absolute, off-screen, visibility hidden)
- Write HTML via `iframe.contentDocument.open()/write()/close()`
- Wait for rendering: 2x nested `requestAnimationFrame`
- Call `iframe.contentWindow.print()` to trigger browser dialog
- Cleanup via `afterprint` event listener OR 5-second `setTimeout` fallback — **whichever fires first cancels the other** (DA patch P2-10: mutual cancellation). Both paths check `iframe.parentNode` before removal (idempotent cleanup)
- Returns a `PrintJob` containing `promise` (resolves to `PrintResult`) and `cleanup` (idempotent, for hook-level unmount handling)
- Never throws — all errors caught and returned as `{ success: false, error }`
- ~80-130 LOC

#### `lib/print/templates/shared-styles.ts`
- Export `getSharedStyles(): string`
- System fonts: `-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif`
- `@page { margin: 12mm 15mm; }`
- `body { margin: 0; padding: 20px; max-width: 72mm; }` (DA patch P1-2: fits 80mm thermal receipt paper with margins; letter/A4 prints centered with whitespace — acceptable for pilot)
- `box-sizing: border-box` on all elements
- Tolerant of 95-105% browser zoom (no fixed pixel widths, use relative units)

#### `lib/print/templates/comp-slip.ts`
- Export `buildCompSlipHtml(payload: CompFulfillmentPayload): string`
- All string fields HTML-escaped via `escapeHtml()` (R12)
- Monetary values: `face_value_cents / 100` formatted as `$XX.XX` (R13)
- Points values displayed as integers
- Reference number: last 8 chars of `ledger_id` prominent (large monospace), full UUID in small print (ADR-045 D3)
- Layout: casino name header → player info → reward details → staff/timestamp → reference
- Self-contained HTML document with inline CSS from `getSharedStyles()`
- `issued_at` ISO 8601 formatted to readable locale date/time

#### `lib/print/templates/coupon.ts`
- Export `buildCouponHtml(payload: EntitlementFulfillmentPayload): string`
- All string fields HTML-escaped via `escapeHtml()` (R19)
- **Validation number is MOST PROMINENT element**: large font, monospace, bordered (R17)
- Conditional: `required_match_wager_cents` renders only when not `null` (R20)
- Conditional: `expires_at` renders only when not `null` (R21)
- Monetary values formatted as `$XX.XX` from integer cents
- Shows: casino name, player name, reward name, face value, match wager (conditional), validation number (PROMINENT), expiry (conditional), tier, staff name, timestamp
- Self-contained HTML document with inline CSS

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0
- [ ] All exports match specified signatures
- [ ] `escapeHtml` encodes all 5 characters: `< > & " '`
- [ ] Templates produce valid self-contained HTML documents

---

### WS2: Print Dispatch, Hook & Component Wiring

**Purpose:** Connect the print module to the existing issuance UI flow.

**Deliverables:**

#### `lib/print/print-reward.ts`
- Export `printReward(payload: FulfillmentPayload): PrintJob`
- Switch on `payload.family` discriminant:
  - `'points_comp'` → `buildCompSlipHtml(payload)` → `iframePrint(html)`
  - `'entitlement'` → `buildCouponHtml(payload)` → `iframePrint(html)`
- Exhaustive check via `const _exhaustive: never = payload` default case
- Returns `PrintJob` from `iframePrint` (propagates cleanup handle to caller)

#### `lib/print/hooks/use-print-reward.ts`
- Export `usePrintReward(): { print, state, error, reset }`
  - `print(payload: FulfillmentPayload, mode?: PrintInvocationMode): void`
  - `state: PrintState` — `'idle' | 'printing' | 'success' | 'error'`
  - `error: string | null`
  - `reset(): void` — returns to idle
- State machine: idle → printing → success|error
- On re-call: resets to `printing` immediately (R34, R35)
- Mode parameter accepted but not branched on in pilot (R39A forward compat — explicitly no-op, not tested for behavioral differences)
- **DA patch P1-4**: Insert 2x `requestAnimationFrame` yield between `setState('printing')` and `printReward()` call to ensure "Printing..." spinner paints before the blocking `window.print()` dialog
- **DA patch P1-3**: Internally receives `const job = printReward(payload)`, stores `job.cleanup` for unmount cleanup, awaits `job.promise` for success/error state transitions
- `useEffect` cleanup on unmount calls stored `job.cleanup()` to cancel pending timeouts and remove orphaned iframes
- **No `useTransition`** — print is an imperative DOM side effect, not a React transition
- **No `useCallback`** — React 19 compiler handles memoization

#### `components/player-360/header/issue-reward-button.tsx` (MODIFY)
- Import and call `usePrintReward` hook
- Create fulfillment handler: `(payload) => hook.print(payload, 'auto_attempt')`
- Pass `printState` and `onPrint` callback through `IssueRewardDrawer` → `IssuanceResultPanel`
- Preserve existing `onFulfillmentReady` prop for external consumers

#### `components/loyalty/issue-reward-drawer.tsx` (MODIFY — bridge component)
- Thread new props (`printState`, `onPrint`) from `IssueRewardButton` through to `IssuanceResultPanel`
- No business logic changes — pure prop passthrough

#### `components/player-360/header/player-360-header-content.tsx` (MODIFY — DA patch P1-1)
- Thread missing props to `<IssueRewardButton>`: `casinoName`, `staffName`, `currentTier`, `currentBalance`
- Source values from existing query caches and auth context already available in this component
- Without this, printed artifacts will have blank casino name, staff name, and tier — operationally broken

#### `components/loyalty/issuance-result-panel.tsx` (MODIFY)
- Accept new props: `printState?: PrintState`, `onPrint?: (payload: FulfillmentPayload, mode: PrintInvocationMode) => void`
- Print button reflects `printState`:
  - `idle` → "Print" (enabled)
  - `printing` → "Printing..." (disabled, spinner)
  - `success` → "Print again" (re-clickable) — success means print-dialog invocation succeeded; does NOT assert physical printing completed
  - `error` → "Print failed — try again" (error styling, re-clickable)
- **DA patch P0-1 (CRITICAL)**: Add `useRef` guard to auto-fire `queueMicrotask` path. The existing code (line 189) claims "Using a ref to ensure it fires only once per result" but **no ref exists** — the auto-fire runs on every re-render. Fix: add `const hasFiredRef = useRef(false)` and gate the `queueMicrotask` call with `!hasFiredRef.current`. Reset ref when `result` identity changes.
- Auto-fire path: existing `onFulfillmentReady` callback (triggers auto-print in parent)
- Manual Print button invocation mode:
  - Explicit click from `idle` or `error` state (before any successful attempt) → `onPrint(payload, 'manual_print')`
  - Explicit click from `success` state (after prior successful print-dialog invocation) → `onPrint(payload, 'manual_reprint')`
- **Manual Print always available regardless of auto-print outcome** (R38, ADR-045 D1A)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0
- [ ] `npm run lint` exits 0
- [ ] Comp slip prints with all required fields (manual test)
- [ ] Coupon prints with prominent validation number (manual test)
- [ ] Reprint works without re-issuance (manual test)
- [ ] Print button reflects all 4 states (manual test)
- [ ] Auto-print failure does not block manual Print (manual test)
- [ ] `printState` and `onPrint` are threaded end-to-end: `IssueRewardButton` → `IssueRewardDrawer` → `IssuanceResultPanel`

---

### WS3: Unit Tests

**Purpose:** Comprehensive unit test coverage for all print module components.

**Test Location:** `lib/print/__tests__/` (co-located per governance standard)

**Deliverables:**

#### `lib/print/__tests__/escape-html.test.ts` (`/** @jest-environment node */`)
- Encodes `<` to `&lt;`, `>` to `&gt;`, `&` to `&amp;`, `"` to `&quot;`, `'` to `&#x27;`
- Handles empty string
- Passes through string with no special chars
- Encodes string with multiple special chars
- Preserves unicode characters (e.g., `'Casino Río'` passes through unchanged)
- Backticks pass through unchanged (not exploitable in HTML-only context)

#### `lib/print/__tests__/comp-slip.test.ts` (`/** @jest-environment node */`)
- Contains casino name as header
- Contains player name (escaped)
- Formats `face_value_cents` 2500 as `$25.00`
- Formats zero cents: 0 as `$0.00`
- Formats sub-dollar: 50 as `$0.50`
- Displays `points_redeemed` and `balance_after` as integers
- Shows last 8 chars of `ledger_id` prominently
- Contains full `ledger_id` UUID
- Contains staff name and formatted timestamp
- Escapes HTML in player_name with `<script>` injection attempt
- Returns valid HTML document (`<!DOCTYPE html>`)
- Contains shared styles (system font family)

#### `lib/print/__tests__/coupon.test.ts` (`/** @jest-environment node */`)
- Contains casino name as header
- Validation number is present
- Formats `face_value_cents` correctly
- Shows match wager when `required_match_wager_cents` is not null
- Omits match wager when `required_match_wager_cents` is null
- Shows expiry when `expires_at` is not null
- Omits expiry when `expires_at` is null
- Contains tier, staff name, timestamp
- Escapes HTML in all string fields

#### `lib/print/__tests__/iframe-print.test.ts` (`/** @jest-environment jsdom */`)
- Setup: Mock DOM APIs (`document.createElement`, iframe properties)
- Creates hidden iframe and appends to `document.body`
- Writes HTML content to iframe document
- Calls `iframe.contentWindow.print()`
- Returns `{ success: true }` on successful print call
- Removes iframe after `afterprint` event — cancels timeout
- Removes iframe after 5s timeout fallback — idempotent if already removed
- `afterprint` and `setTimeout` are mutually cancelling (DA patch P2-10)
- Returns `{ success: false, error }` when iframe creation fails
- Returns `{ success: false }` in SSR context (no `window`) (DA patch P1-8)
- Never throws — catches all errors

#### `lib/print/__tests__/print-reward.test.ts` (`/** @jest-environment node */`)
- Setup: Mock `buildCompSlipHtml`, `buildCouponHtml`, `iframePrint` (returns `PrintJob`)
- Routes `points_comp` payload to `buildCompSlipHtml`
- Routes `entitlement` payload to `buildCouponHtml`
- Passes built HTML to `iframePrint`
- Returns `PrintJob` from `iframePrint` (propagates both `promise` and `cleanup`)

#### `lib/print/__tests__/use-print-reward.test.ts` (`/** @jest-environment jsdom */`)
- Setup: `renderHook` from `@testing-library/react`, mock `printReward`
- Initial state is `idle` with `null` error
- Transitions to `printing` when `print()` called
- Transitions to `success` on successful print
- Transitions to `error` with message on failed print
- Resets to `printing` on subsequent print call (reprint)
- `reset()` returns to `idle` state
- Cleanup on unmount: cancels pending timeouts, removes orphaned iframes (DA patch P1-3)

#### `components/loyalty/__tests__/issuance-result-panel.test.tsx` (DA patch P1-7)
- Setup: render `IssuanceResultPanel` with mock result and printState
- Print button renders correctly for all 4 `printState` values (idle/printing/success/error)
- Print button remains clickable when `printState` is `'error'` or `'success'` (AC10, AC5)
- `onPrint` callback fires with correct payload on Print button click
- Auto-fire fires exactly once per result (verifies `useRef` guard from DA P0-1)
- Re-render with same props does not re-trigger `onFulfillmentReady`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm test -- --testPathPattern='(lib/print/|components/loyalty/__tests__/issuance-result-panel)' --silent` — all tests pass
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0
- [ ] `npm run lint` exits 0
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0

---

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All files in `lib/print/` created per file structure (including `escape-html.ts`)
- [ ] `onFulfillmentReady` handler wired in `IssueRewardButton`
- [ ] `player-360-header-content.tsx` threads `casinoName`, `staffName`, `currentTier`, `currentBalance` to `IssueRewardButton`
- [ ] Auto-fire `useRef` guard added in `IssuanceResultPanel` (DA P0-1 fix)
- [ ] Print button in `IssuanceResultPanel` reflects hook state (4 states)
- [ ] `usePrintReward` includes `useEffect` cleanup and rAF paint yield
- [ ] `lib/print/` ownership registered in SRM under LoyaltyService
- [ ] Unit tests for all modules pass (including `issuance-result-panel.test.tsx`)
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Manual test: comp slip prints with all required fields (non-blank casino/staff names)
- [ ] Manual test: coupon prints with validation number prominent
- [ ] Manual test: reprint works without re-issuance
- [ ] Manual test: if auto-attempt wiring is present, it fires at most once per result and never loops
- [ ] Manual test: manual Print remains canonical and available even when auto-attempt does not fire or fails

---

## Appendix: DA Team Review (Attempt 1 → Revised)

**Consolidated Verdict (pre-revision):** BLOCK (1 P0, 8 P1)
**Post-revision status:** All P0/P1 findings addressed in spec above

| # | Severity | Finding | Resolution |
|---|----------|---------|------------|
| P0-1 | P0 | Auto-fire queueMicrotask infinite loop (R1/R3/R4/R5) | Added useRef guard to WS2 IssuanceResultPanel scope |
| P1-1 | P1 | Missing props at player-360-header-content.tsx call site (R1/R3) | Added file to WS2 outputs |
| P1-2 | P1 | max-width 210mm contradicts R25 80mm receipt (R3) | Changed to 72mm (fits 80mm thermal with margins) |
| P1-3 | P1 | Iframe DOM leak on navigation (R5) | Added cleanup handle + useEffect cleanup |
| P1-4 | P1 | window.print() blocks — spinner won't paint (R5) | Added 2x rAF yield in hook |
| P1-5 | P1 | escapeHtml in types.ts (R1/R2/R3/R4/R5) | Moved to lib/print/escape-html.ts |
| P1-6 | P1 | lib/print/ not in SRM (R2) | Added to DoD — register in SRM v4.21.0 |
| P1-7 | P1 | No component test for IssuanceResultPanel (R4) | Added issuance-result-panel.test.tsx to WS3 |
| P1-8 | P1 | Missing SSR guard test + @jest-environment pragmas (R4) | Added SSR test case + pragmas to all test files |
| P2-10 | P2 | afterprint/setTimeout not mutually cancelling (R5) | Specified mutual cancellation + idempotent cleanup |

### Post-DA Audit Patches (EXEC-053-audit-delta)

| # | Severity | Finding | Resolution |
|---|----------|---------|------------|
| AUD-1 | P1 | `iframePrint` API contradictory — `Promise<PrintResult>` + cleanup handle | Changed to `PrintJob = { promise, cleanup }` return type |
| AUD-2 | P1 | `onPrint` callback drops invocation mode at component boundary | Changed to `onPrint(payload, mode: PrintInvocationMode)` |
| AUD-3 | P1 | Success label "Printed" overclaims physical print completion | Changed to "Print again" with explicit non-assertion note |
| AUD-4 | P1 | Test gate `testPathPattern` excludes component test | Expanded to include `components/loyalty/__tests__/issuance-result-panel` |
| AUD-5 | P2 | DoD auto-print language overstates requirement | Tightened to "at most once, never loops" + manual-canonical language |

### Second Audit Pass (EXEC-053-another-pass-audit-delta)

| # | Severity | Finding | Resolution |
|---|----------|---------|------------|
| AUD2-1 | P1 | `PrintJob` not propagated through `printReward` — cleanup ownership ambiguous | `printReward` now returns `PrintJob`; hook receives `job.cleanup` + awaits `job.promise` |
| AUD2-2 | P1 | `issue-reward-drawer.tsx` missing from WS2 outputs (bridge in threading path) | Added to outputs + acceptance criteria for end-to-end prop threading |
| AUD2-3 | P1 | WS3 acceptance criteria still used old `lib/print/` pattern excluding component test | Aligned with top-level gate pattern |
| AUD2-4 | P2 | `manual_reprint` mode exists but trigger point unspecified | Specified: `idle`/`error` → `manual_print`, `success` → `manual_reprint` |
